articles.title: ‘Until next time Boston’: Scottish newspaper ad thanks city for welcoming Tartan Army

summary: Scottish newspaper ad thanks Boston for hosting Tartan Army during their visit.

articles.title: Reflecting Pool liner was cut with a sharp knife or razor, National Park Service says

summary: National Park Service confirms Reflecting Pool liner was cut with a sharp knife or razor.
